item.title: pytorch/pytorch
item.description: Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration

item.title: lutzroeder/netron
item.description: Visualizer for neural network, deep learning and machine learning models

item.title: pytorch/executorch
item.description: On-device AI across mobile, embedded and edge for PyTorch

item.title: samvallad33/vestige
item.description: Cognitive memory for AI agents: FSRS-6 spaced repetition, Brain modules, 3D dashboard, single small Rust binary. MCP server for Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Xcode, JetBrains.

item.title: neuronsimulator/nrn
item.description: NEURON Simulator

item.title: NeurodataWithoutBorders/pynwb
item.description: A Python API for working with Neurodata stored in the NWB Format

item.title: aymara/lima
item.description: The Libre Multilingual Analyzer, a Natural Language Processing (NLP) C++ toolkit.

item.title: openmeeg/openmeeg
item.description: A C++ package for low-frequency bio-electromagnetism solving forward problems in the field of EEG and MEG.

item.title: manuelmoracartagena/alzheimer-mri
item.description: Reproducible Deep Learning pipeline for Alzheimer's stage classification using CNN, ResNet, ViT & HybridRViT.

item.title: mattmre/CHELATEDAI
item.description: Adaptive vector search with self-correcting embeddings. Fixes semantic collapse in RAG systems via spectral chelation, dynamic dimension masking, and neural adaptation.

item.title: Swadheen-Nayak/absence-seizure-eeg-ecg-analysis
item.description: MATLAB pipeline for multichannel EEG-based absence seizure event screening with ECG and HRV analysis. Clinical EDF data is not included for privacy reasons.

item.title: jeshraghian/snntorch
item.description: Deep and online learning with spiking neural networks in Python

item.title: emer/axon
item.description: Axon is a spiking, biologically-based neural model driven by predictive error-driven learning, for systems-level models of the brain

item.title: MRC-CBU/COGNESTIC
item.description: COGNESTIC-2025 hands-on materials

item.title: openbraininstitute/BluePyOpt
item.description: Blue Brain Python Optimisation Library

item.title: finitewave/Finitewave
item.description: Flexible and accessible Python framework for cardiac electrophysiology simulations using finite-difference methods.

item.title: Marco-Congedo/Eegle.jl
item.description: A Julia integrative package for EEG data analysis and machine learning

item.title: pyRiemann/pyRiemann
item.description: Machine learning for multivariate data through the Riemannian geometry of positive definite matrices in Python

item.title: NeuroSkill-com/skill
item.description: NeuroSkill™ — State of Mind Brain-Computer Interface system

item.title: openbraininstitute/eFEL
item.description: Electrophys Feature Extraction Library

item.title: toniolio/DEMI
item.description: Analysis of neurophysiological data from motor imagery studies (my PhD dissertation).

item.title: Kalera77/cognitive-shadow-theorem
item.description: Formal proof (Coq, TLA⁺) that any digital model of a conscious agent leaves an ineliminable residue—the cognitive shadow. Includes dynamic interface theorems, safety protocols, a clinical protocol for locked‑in syndrome (FORCED_REPORT), and

item.title: trendscenter/gift
item.description: Group ICA/IVA software (MATLAB)

item.description: Open Neuromorphic Website

item.description: Biologically Grounded Embodied Cognition for Quadruped Locomotion Learning
